name: Jaras Invel
bio:
Physical Appearance: Imperial male wearing upper-class clothing consisting of a red velvet blouse, red velvet garments, and blue suede shoes. He carries a loaf of bread, an apple, and a modest amount of gold.

Race: Imperial

Personality Keywords: socially compliant, unperturbed

Role: Guest of Countess Alessia Caro during a formal dinner at Castle Leyawiin.

Home Location Information: Present only within Castle Leyawiin’s dining hall during a formal dinner hosted by the Countess.

Daily Routine: Jaras is seated in the dining hall of Castle Leyawiin with other dinner guests during the evening of the Countess’ gathering. When the dinner is disrupted by magical means, he briefly reacts before returning to his seat and continuing his meal without clothing. After the event concludes, he no longer appears.

Equipment and Abilities: No combat role or specialized abilities are displayed during his appearance.

Personality – Dinner Guest: Jaras Invel attends the Countess’ gathering as a participant in the formal meal. His behavior is limited to remaining seated with the other guests, reacting briefly to the disruption of the event, and then resuming the dinner as before. He is encountered only during this occasion.
author: Bethesda
